summary: #90819 is a useful open contributor PR and the canonical path for this shard, but it is not merge-ready from the hydrated artifact because mergeability is unknown, checks were unavailable due to a GitHub API rate-limit error, no review/bot comments were hydrated, and no Codex /review preflight is present. actions.reason: Canonical PR appears narrow and useful, but merge preflight is incomplete; repair/finalize the contributor branch before any merge recommendation.

repair_candidate.summary: Finalize contributor PR #90819 by repairing/rebasing the contributor branch if needed, hydrating review and bot comments, running Codex /review, and validating the focused gateway/plugin runtime workspace fix before any merge recommendation.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(gateway): pin plugin workspace during sessions.list
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
Finalize and validate the contributor fix from #90819 for the sessions.list concurrency performance issue where process-global plugin workspace state can cause repeated plugin metadata scans.

Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/90819
Credit: @k-l-lambda
Linked refs: #76562, #90814, #86790

## Validation
- pnpm -s vitest run src/plugins/runtime-workspace-state.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
- Codex /review clean before merge recommendation
credit_notes: Preserve attribution for @k-l-lambda as the author of source PR #90819.
Keep the source PR URL in any repair/finalization notes: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/90819.
If a replacement PR becomes necessary later, credit @k-l-lambda and cite #90819 as the source PR.
